text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon, young Lily picked petals from flowers. For every petalous bloom she collected, she wished upon them.

Her list was long:

* A pet giant owl furry toy.
* An adventure through enchanted lands.
* A love note from the stars.

As evening settled in, Lily placed the petals gently into an old leather-bound journal. She wished all day long.

That night stars twinkled like tiny lanterns. They whispered secrets to each other.

When Lily nestled beneath her stars favorite cloud—

Owl!

He was big. His feathers were a deep, comforting dusk hue.

"A pet giant owl!" she squeaked.

Owl hooted softly.

"I wish..."

She crinkled her nose—

She wished for friendship.

A few mornings later:

"Wander!"

There he was. Owl.

They talked.

Days turned into weeks.

They climbed trees. They swooped. They hunted berries.

One starlit evening:

"What if?"

They wanted adventures together.

They dream
